title: ValueConditionResult
description: ValueConditionResult: Object representing result of IValueCondition.

Passed.description: Information whether the object passed or failed the condition. Null means inconclusive result.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.
Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
